Street:
Date:
M.O.T. properly set up?

sections.description: Preparation of Base for Hot Patching

sheets.description: Preparation of Base for Hot Patching

entries.label: Is the limerock base compacted and have passing density tests been performed at the required frequency?
Is the trench clean of loose material and all nearby loose material that could be dragged in the trench during the pavement process been removed?
Is the base dry and does it appear that rain will not occur during the paving process?
Has the trench been excavated to 1.25 inches below the existing asphalt surface?
Has the trench been milled or saw cut at least 18 inches outside the limits of the trench?
Does the saw cutting include all areas where the construction has disturbed the existing pavement?
Is the saw cutting straight, clean, and absent of broken pieces?
Has the prime coat been applied evenly to the prepared subgrade?
Has the prime coat had at least 10 minutes to set before paving?
Is the temperature of the material between 100˚ F and 150˚ F?
Have you checked the delivery ticket, has S-1 been delivered?
Company:
Ticket Number:
Is the temperature of the asphalt in the hopper between 230˚ F and 370˚ F? (Check at start, middle, and ends of truck loads)
Is the asphalt thickness the required 1.25 inches?
Is the contractor keeping traffic off the asphalt until it has been rolled sufficiently?
Type of Roller Used:
Comments:
